hero.title: The Little Bunny
hero.tagline: A personal photo diary. Slow moments, quiet streets, and honest light — captured on Fujifilm.

about.heading: The Photographer
about.bio:
Bunnies. is a personal photography journal — a quiet place for photos made slowly, on Fujifilm cameras, with attention to light, texture, and the kind of moments that pass without announcement.

The name comes from that feeling of something caught in suspension: a street at 6am, the last light on a wall, a person unaware of being seen. Bunnies. — as in quiet, as in not-moving, as in continuing.

Shot primarily on the X-T5, with a preference for Classic Chrome and Acros. Mostly 23mm. Sometimes 35mm.
